name: PM SVANidhi – Street Vendor Loan
eligibility: Street vendors with vending certificate or letter of recommendation from ULB. Must be 18+ years old.
benefits: Collateral-free working capital loan of ₹10,000 – ₹50,000 at subsidised interest rates. Digital transaction incentive of ₹1200/year.

name: MUDRA Shishu Loan
eligibility: Non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. New or existing business. Loan up to ₹50,000.
benefits: Collateral-free loan up to ₹50,000 for starting or growing a micro enterprise. Low interest rates.

name: MUDRA Kishore Loan
eligibility: Non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises seeking loans between ₹50,001 and ₹5 lakh.
benefits: Collateral-free loan between ₹50,001 and ₹5 lakh for business expansion or equipment purchase.

name: MUDRA Tarun Loan
eligibility: Established non-corporate small/medium enterprises seeking loans between ₹5 lakh and ₹10 lakh.
benefits: Loan up to ₹10 lakh for business growth, working capital, and asset acquisition.

name: CGTMSE – Credit Guarantee for MSMEs
eligibility: New and existing micro and small enterprises in manufacturing or services sector. Loan up to ₹2 crore.
benefits: Credit guarantee coverage up to 85% of loan amount. No collateral or third-party guarantee required.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
eligibility: SC/ST and women entrepreneurs setting up a greenfield enterprise in manufacturing, services, or trading sector.
benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises. Covers 75% of project cost.

name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
eligibility: Artisans and craftspeople in 18 traditional trades (e.g. blacksmith, carpenter, goldsmith, potter, weaver). Must work with hands and tools.
benefits: Recognition via PM Vishwakarma certificate. Skill training with ₹500/day stipend. Collateral-free loan up to ₹3 lakh at 5% interest. Digital payments incentive.

name: PMEGP – Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
eligibility: Any individual 18+ years. Must have passed VIII standard for projects above ₹10 lakh (manufacturing) or ₹5 lakh (services). No income ceiling.
benefits: Subsidy of 15–35% of project cost (higher for rural/weaker sections). For manufacturing projects up to ₹50 lakh and service up to ₹20 lakh.

name: Udyam Registration (MSME)
eligibility: Any business entity (sole proprietor, partnership, company) with investment up to ₹50 crore (manufacturing) or ₹10 crore (services).
benefits: Free registration as MSME. Enables access to priority sector lending, government subsidies, delayed payment protections, and scheme eligibility.

name: SIDBI MSME Loan in 59 Minutes
eligibility: Existing MSMEs with valid Udyam registration, GST registration, and ITR filing. For in-principle loan approval within 59 minutes.
benefits: In-principle loan approval within 59 minutes. Loans from ₹1 lakh to ₹5 crore at competitive rates.
